elements.text: As you're finishing an assignment at midnight, you realize you still have a couple of math problems left. You plan to wake up a little early to finish them before your important 9 am deadline. While you're setting your alarm and thinking about your plan, you feel...

elements.name: waking_up_ready--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
